unittest/IsolatedAsyncioTestCase.name: IsolatedAsyncioTestCase
unittest/IsolatedAsyncioTestCase.description: This class provides an API similar to TestCase and also accepts coroutines as test functions. Added in version 3.8. loop_factory¶ The loop_factory passed to asyncio.Runner. Override in subclasses with asyncio.EventLoop to avoid using the asyncio policy system. Added in version 3.13. async asyncSetUp()¶ Method called to prepare the test fixture. This is called after TestCase.setUp(). This is called immediately before calling the test method; other than AssertionError or SkipTest, any exception...

unittest/installHandler.name: installHandler
unittest/installHandler.description: Install the control-c handler. When a signal.SIGINT is received (usually in response to the user pressing control-c) all registered results have stop() called.

info.excerpt: Install the control-c handler. When a signal.SIGINT is received (usually in response to the user pressing control-c) all registered results have stop() called.

unittest/TestCase/id.name: id
unittest/TestCase/id.description: Return a string identifying the specific test case. This is usually the full name of the test method, including the module and class name.

info.excerpt: Return a string identifying the specific test case. This is usually the full name of the test method, including the module and class name.
